summary: Preserved authoritative terminal-evidence details through the parent failure projection and dashboard, and upgraded the escaped-failure replay to cross the AgentRun terminal-evaluation activity boundary. Runtime-neutral capability-aware continuation remains open.

gapStatuses.evidence: Bounded continuation remains implemented inside CodexSessionAdapter; attempt 3 did not safely complete the workflow-owned capability-aware refactor.
gapStatuses.remaining: Move the continuation decision and retry bound into replay-safe AgentRun orchestration using an immutable runtime capability snapshot, with supported and unsupported runtime tests.

gapStatuses.evidence: Parent failure diagnostics now retain failureCode, terminalContractId, terminalContractMissingEvidence, queuedChildCount, and queuedChildren. The final summary and dashboard render the same failure code, queued count, diagnostics reference, and partial child workflow IDs; targeted parent and frontend suites pass.

The MM-1201 replay now drives MoonMindAgentRun._evaluate_terminal_contract through TemporalAgentRuntimeActivities.agent_runtime_evaluate_terminal_evidence and proves the AgentRun authority metadata and execution_error result. Parent finalization/projection is covered by the focused parent workflow test, but not yet in the same integration replay.
gapStatuses.remaining: Extend the minimized integration replay through parent finalization/projection after the AgentRun failure result.

targetedLocalChecks.details: The command unexpectedly selected the broad Python unit suite before the UI target and exposed two unrelated pre-existing missing moonspec/bundle fixture files; it was stopped after recording the failures. The documented direct focused frontend command then passed.
